testcase.name: getalertaccountAttributes_v4
testcase.failure: org.junit.ComparisonFailure: expected:<{"[Alert":[{"Messgage":[],"Success":true,"Messages":[{"Enabled":0,"Info":"","Level":0}]}]]}> but was:<{"[result":[]]}> at testcase.name: putcontactLogv4

failure.message: expected [{"Check":{"Success":true,"Data":{"FileName":"C:\\Users\\tr15523\\Documents\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\APCHE0000.TXT"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Sent To AP updated","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"LocationId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"CustomerId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"ActionCode is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"FirstContactDateTime is required","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Check":{"Success":true,"Data":{"FileName":"C:\\Users\\tr15523\\Documents\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\APCHE0000.TXT"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Sent To AP updated","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"LocationId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"CustomerId is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"ActionCode is required","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"FirstContactDateTime is required","Level":3}]}}] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at testcase.name: getContactLogDetail

failure.message: expected [{"result":[{"Description":"Request to read meter","AdditionalText":"","ContactMethod":"By Phone","ActionCode":"2","UserID":"sa","UserName":"sa","ContactDate":"2022-01-01T20:15:14.000Z","NextDate":"2022-01-21","IsCompleted":"Completed","Resolution":"","ServiceOrderNumber":"SORD00000008992","ServiceOrderStatusDescription":"Pending","RequestID":"DISCONNECT","RequestDescription":"Disconnected connection","DrillbackLink":"cogsDrillback://DGPB/?Db=&Srv=DESKTOP-QU86F3Q&Cmp=TWO&Prod=229&Act=OPEN&Func=ServiceOrder&LocationID=LOCATION008&ServiceOrderNumber=SORD00000008992&CogsDrillback=1"}]}] but found [{"result":[{"Description":"Request to read meter","AdditionalText":"","ContactMethod":"By Phone","ActionCode":"2","UserID":"sa","UserName":"sa","ContactDate":"2022-01-01T20:15:14.000Z","NextDate":"2022-01-21","IsCompleted":"Completed","Resolution":"","ServiceOrderNumber":"SORD00000008991","ServiceOrderStatusDescription":"Pending","RequestID":"DISCONNECT","RequestDescription":"Disconnected connection","DrillbackLink":"cogsDrillback://DGPB/?Db=&Srv=DESKTOP-QU86F3Q&Cmp=TWO&Prod=229&Act=OPEN&Func=ServiceOrder&LocationID=LOCATION008&ServiceOrderNumber=SORD00000008991&CogsDrillback=1"}]}]
